info.title: Admin Portal API
info.description: Authorization: Bearer {token} for all secured routes. Partner integration routes (/api/v1/partner/...) expect a Sanctum token for a user with the partner role. Admin/ops routes (/api/v1/customers admin CRUD, /api/v1/products, etc.) expect a Sanctum token for a staff user; mutating routes require admin or super_admin role.

post.description: Same behavior as POST /api/v1/partner/customers. Prefer the /partner/customers path.

get.summary: List customers with covers expiring within 30 days

patch.summary: Activate or deactivate product access for a partner

post.summary: Register user with email and password

message.example: The password field confirmation does not match.
Account is locked. Try again later.
We have emailed your password reset link.
We can not find a user with that email address.
This password reset token is invalid.

post.description: Preferred partner endpoint. Uses Bearer token from a partner Sanctum token.

partner_id.description: Optional. When omitted, the authenticated partner id is used.

product_id.description: Product id enabled for this partner

customer_data.description: Dynamic fields from the product definition (e.g. first_name, last_name, email, cover_start_date, cover_duration_months)
